mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SITE_VISIT_LOG WHERE VISIT_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT TO_CHAR(DAY_LIST.VISIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VISIT_DATE, NVL(VISIT_STATS.TOTAL_VISITOR_COUNT,0) AS TOTAL_VISITOR_COUNT, NVL(VISIT_STATS.LOGIN_VISITOR_COUNT,0) AS LOGIN_VISITOR_COUNT, NVL(VISIT_STATS.GUEST_VISITOR_COUNT,0) AS GUEST_VISITOR_COUNT FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (LEVEL -1) AS VISIT_DATE FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= #{days} ) DAY_LIST LEFT JOIN( SELECT VISIT_DATE, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_VISITOR_COUNT, SUM( CASE WHEN VISITOR_TYPE = 'LOGIN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS LOGIN_VISITOR_COUNT, SUM( CASE WHEN VISITOR_TYPE = 'GUEST' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS GUEST_VISITOR_COUNT FROM SITE_VISIT_LOG WHERE VISIT_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (#{days} -1) GROUP BY VISIT_DATE) VISIT_STATS ON VISIT_STATS.VISIT_DATE = DAY_LIST.VISIT_DATE ORDER BY DAY_LIST.VISIT_DATE DESC
